'''Chris Reiff''' is an illustrator and product designer with more than 20 years experience working on official Star Wars projects. Some of his clients include [[Lucasfilm]], [[The Walt Disney Company|Walt Disney Imagineering]], [[Hasbro Inc.|Hasbro]], [[ANOVOS]], [[Industrial Light & Magic|ILM]], [[Random House]], [[Dorling Kindersley]], [[becker&mayer!]], [[Haynes Publishing]], and more.

His illustration work can be seen in numerous Star Wars books and on high end packaging. Chris Reiff and fellow artist [[Chris Trevas]] are the illustration team behind the Star Wars Haynes manuals, some of Hasbro's Titanium and Black Series packaging schematics, Star Wars Lightsaber Thumb Wrestling, the Star Wars Blueprints series from DK, and the detailed instructions for the Anovos product line.

Reiff co-founded [http://www.partsofsw.com The Parts of Star Wars] website with [[Chris Trevas]] and is a passionate replica prop builder. In 2011 he built a replica [[R2-D2]], redefining the accuracy of the [[R2-D2 Builders Club]] specs in the process.
